feature: Config schema migration + telemetry hooks (opt-in, local-only)
description: Final spec sprint. Bober.config.json existing files (pre-this-spec) parse with the extended schema — all new fields have defaults preserving current autopilot behavior. Add telemetry hooks emitting opt-in local-only JSONL events to .bober/telemetry/ for tracking checkpoint approval rates, incident resolution times, agent retry counts. Telemetry default OFF. No network egress under any condition.

successCriteria.description: src/config/schema.ts: extended schema parses bober.config.json files at the current state (no pipeline.mode, no observability.providers, etc.) without error. Defaults applied: pipeline.mode='autopilot', pipeline.checkpointMechanism='noop', observability.providers=[], incident.autoPostmortem=true, telemetry.enabled=false.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Test: parse existing bober.config.json (the one in this repo NOW). Verify zero errors. Verify resolved defaults via getConfig().

successCriteria.description: Schema migration helper: `bober config migrate` CLI subcommand updates an existing bober.config.json to explicitly include all new fields with their default values (informative, not required — back-compat parsing handles missing fields).
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Verify subcommand. Test: run on a minimal config; verify new file has new sections.

successCriteria.description: telemetry.enabled (bool, default false): when true, emit events to .bober/telemetry/<date>.jsonl. Event shape: {timestamp, eventType, runId?, incidentId?, specId?, durationMs?, outcome?, ... event-specific fields}. EventTypes: 'checkpoint-approved', 'checkpoint-rejected', 'checkpoint-edited', 'sprint-pass', 'sprint-fail-retry', 'incident-resolved', 'incident-aborted', 'agent-spawn', 'agent-error'.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Read telemetry module. Verify event shapes. Test: with enabled=true, simulate each event type, verify line written.

successCriteria.description: Network egress guard: telemetry implementation MUST not contain any fetch/http/https/net imports. Static analysis (grep or eslint rule) enforces.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Grep src/telemetry/ for: 'fetch(', 'require(\'http\')', 'from \'http\'', 'require(\'https\')', 'from \'https\''. Assert zero matches. Add ESLint rule restricting these imports in src/telemetry/.

successCriteria.description: Privacy: telemetry events do NOT include feedbackText content, ChangeEntry commands, observability MCP response bodies, or any field that could contain user code or prod data. Allowed: timestamps, IDs, durations, counts, enum outcomes.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Read each event-emission call site. Verify NONE include user-content fields. Test: simulate an incident with prod-looking data; verify telemetry .jsonl contains zero prod content.

successCriteria.description: CLI: `bober telemetry status` (prints whether enabled + recent event counts), `bober telemetry purge` (deletes all .bober/telemetry/ files with confirmation), `bober telemetry export` (prints all events as JSONL for offline analysis).
VISION.md (Sprint 26) and AGENTS.md (Sprint 6) updated to document telemetry: opt-in, local-only, what's collected, how to purge.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Grep VISION.md and AGENTS.md for 'telemetry'. Verify the documented properties.

successCriteria.description: Spec COMPLETION: all 28 sprints completed. spec-20260524-bober-vision status flips to 'completed' in the spec JSON file. progress.md updated to reflect completion. history.jsonl appends a 'spec-completed' event.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Read .bober/specs/spec-20260524-bober-vision.json. Verify status='completed'. Verify progress.md updated. Verify history.jsonl event.

successCriteria.description: All existing eval strategies pass. Final regression sweep: re-run the Sprint 27 four-modes integration test; assert exit 0.
successCriteria.verificationMethod: Run typecheck/lint/build/test AND tests/e2e/four-modes.test.ts — assert exit 0.

expectedChanges.description: Final schema review — all new fields with defaults preserving back-compat
Add config migrate and telemetry subcommands
Tests for event emission, privacy, network-guard
Flip status to 'completed' at the very end of this sprint

evaluatorNotes:
Verify backward compat with a HARD test: parse the CURRENT bober.config.json (the one this repo has on disk this moment) via the post-Sprint-28 schema. Confirm zero errors AND that resolved runtime config produces identical autopilot behavior (run an autopilot sprint pipeline before/after, compare commits — should be identical modulo timestamps).

Verify the no-network ESLint rule actually CATCHES violations: write a test file in src/telemetry/ that imports 'http', run lint, confirm it errors. Then delete the test file. This is a regression-prevention test.

Verify privacy: grep ALL telemetry emit() call sites and inspect every data payload. Any field that takes a string from user input is a privacy fail (e.g., `emit('checkpoint-rejected', { feedback: feedbackText })` is wrong; correct: `emit('checkpoint-rejected', { feedbackLength: feedbackText.length })`). Document this in the audit.

Verify telemetry.enabled gate works: when false (default), zero file writes happen even with hundreds of emit() calls. Test: simulate 100 events with enabled=false, verify zero bytes in .bober/telemetry/.

Verify file mode 0600 on telemetry files (matches Sprint 13 audit pattern).

FINAL REGRESSION SWEEP: re-run the Sprint 27 four-modes integration test as part of THIS sprint's eval. If it fails, the spec is not 'completed'. Flip to status='completed' ONLY when full regression passes.

Verify the spec-completed history.jsonl event includes useful metadata: total sprints completed, total duration, ambiguity score at start vs revised, list of any deferred decisions documented in resolvedClarifications.
